title: Unrelevant error message when copying bad length field
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c VARCHAR(3), d INT NOT NULL, e DATE);
INSERT INTO t (c, d, e) VALUES ('abc', 1, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO t (c, d, e) VALUES ('ab', NULL, '2023-01-02');
INSERT INTO t (c, d, e) VALUES ('abcd', 2, '2023-01-03');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE d = 1 OR c IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Copying bad length field in varchar column
